subcodes.first_line: O Herald of the Covenant! The letter of the third of Sha'bán 1323 hath arrived, but the letter that preceded it hath not yet been received [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منادی پیمان مکتوب سیم شعبان ١۳۲۳ واصل ولی مکتوب پیش از آن هنوز نرسیده از
subcodes.subjects: @obedience to and respect for government authority, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @rejection, opposition and persecution
